  • 0.2 Grab vagrancy data for Nebraska and plot against sightings

Climate versus vagrancy data for PABU

  • Show All Code
  • Hide All Code
  • View Source

0.1 Grab vagrancy data for SD and plot against sightings

Code 
SD.vagrancy<-read.csv("~/Desktop/painted.bunting.note/SD.annual.temp.csv")
SD.vagrancy$date<-row.names(SD.vagrancy)
SD.vagrancy$date<-substr(SD.vagrancy$date,1,4)
SD.vagrancy<-SD.vagrancy[3:78,c(2,1)]
rownames(SD.vagrancy)<-NULL
colnames(SD.vagrancy)<-c("date","temp")
SD.vagrancy[77,]<-c("2026",NA)
SD.vagrancy$PABU<-c(rep(0, times=53),1,rep(0, times=7),1,rep(0, times=2),1,rep(0, times=5),1,0,3,0,0,0,2)
#convert farenheit to celsius
SD.vagrancy$temp<-as.numeric(SD.vagrancy$temp)
SD.vagrancy$temp <- (SD.vagrancy$temp - 32) * (5 / 9)

#calculate rolling average temp in the previous 10 year window
rolling.avg<-c(rep(NA, times=9))
for (i in 10:77){
  rolling.avg[i]<-mean(SD.vagrancy$temp[c((i-9):i)])
}
#add to DF
SD.vagrancy$rolling.avg.temp<-rolling.avg


#calculate rolling average # of PABU's in the previous 10 year window
SD.vagrancy$PABU<-as.numeric(SD.vagrancy$PABU)
rolling.avg<-c(rep(NA, times=9))
for (i in 10:77){
  rolling.avg[i]<-mean(SD.vagrancy$PABU[c((i-9):i)])
}
#add to DF
SD.vagrancy$rolling.avg.PABU<-rolling.avg

##ggplot
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(SD.vagrancy, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*100, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("PABU abundance" = "blue", "temp" = "red")) +
  labs(y = "Values") +
  theme_classic()
Warning: Removed 9 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
(`geom_line()`).
Warning: Removed 10 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
(`geom_line()`).

Code 
ggplot(SD.vagrancy, aes(x = date)) +
  #geom_point(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*2+6.5, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  #geom_point(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*2+6.5, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  ylim(6.5, 8.5) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("PABU abundance" = "gray", "temp" = "black")) +
  labs(y = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))
Warning: Removed 9 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
(`geom_line()`).
Removed 10 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
(`geom_line()`).

Code 
pp <- ggplot(SD.vagrancy, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*2+6.5, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  ylim(6.5, 8.5) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("PABU abundance" = "gray", "temp" = "black")) +
  labs(y = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))

#ggsave("~/Desktop/painted.bunting.note/SD.obs.pdf", pp, width = 8, height = 4, units = "in")

0.2 Grab vagrancy data for Nebraska and plot against sightings

Code 
NE.vagrancy<-read.csv("~/Desktop/painted.bunting.note/NOAA.neb.annual.temp.csv")
NE.vagrancy$date<-row.names(NE.vagrancy)
NE.vagrancy$date<-substr(NE.vagrancy$date,1,4)
NE.vagrancy<-NE.vagrancy[3:78,c(2,1)]
rownames(NE.vagrancy)<-NULL
colnames(NE.vagrancy)<-c("date","temp")
NE.vagrancy[77,]<-c("2026",NA)
NE.vagrancy$PABU<-c(rep(0, times=10),1,rep(0, times=5),1,1,rep(0, times=5),1,rep(0, times=22),2,rep(0, times=5),2,1,rep(0, times=2),2,0,2,rep(0, times=5),1,rep(0, times=4),2,0,1,1,1,0,0,2)
#convert farenheit to celsius
NE.vagrancy$temp<-as.numeric(NE.vagrancy$temp)
NE.vagrancy$temp <- (NE.vagrancy$temp - 32) * (5 / 9)

#calculate rolling average temp in the previous 10 year window
rolling.avg<-c(rep(NA, times=9))
for (i in 10:77){
  rolling.avg[i]<-mean(NE.vagrancy$temp[c((i-9):i)])
}
#add to DF
NE.vagrancy$rolling.avg.temp<-rolling.avg


#calculate rolling average # of PABU's in the previous 10 year window
NE.vagrancy$PABU<-as.numeric(NE.vagrancy$PABU)
rolling.avg<-c(rep(NA, times=9))
for (i in 10:77){
  rolling.avg[i]<-mean(NE.vagrancy$PABU[c((i-9):i)])
}
#add to DF
NE.vagrancy$rolling.avg.PABU<-rolling.avg

##ggplot
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(NE.vagrancy, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*100, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("PABU abundance" = "blue", "temp" = "red")) +
  labs(y = "Values") +
  theme_classic()
Warning: Removed 9 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
(`geom_line()`).
Warning: Removed 10 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range

  #geom_point(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*2+8.5, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  #geom_point(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*2+8.5, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  ylim(8.5, 10.5) +

  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*2+8.5, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +

### Grab vagrancy data for SD and plot against sightings
```{r}
SD.vagrancy<-read.csv("~/Desktop/painted.bunting.note/SD.annual.temp.csv")
SD.vagrancy$date<-row.names(SD.vagrancy)
SD.vagrancy$date<-substr(SD.vagrancy$date,1,4)
SD.vagrancy<-SD.vagrancy[3:78,c(2,1)]
rownames(SD.vagrancy)<-NULL
colnames(SD.vagrancy)<-c("date","temp")
SD.vagrancy[77,]<-c("2026",NA)
SD.vagrancy$PABU<-c(rep(0, times=53),1,rep(0, times=7),1,rep(0, times=2),1,rep(0, times=5),1,0,3,0,0,0,2)
#convert farenheit to celsius
SD.vagrancy$temp<-as.numeric(SD.vagrancy$temp)
SD.vagrancy$temp <- (SD.vagrancy$temp - 32) * (5 / 9)

#calculate rolling average temp in the previous 10 year window
rolling.avg<-c(rep(NA, times=9))
for (i in 10:77){
  rolling.avg[i]<-mean(SD.vagrancy$temp[c((i-9):i)])
}
#add to DF
SD.vagrancy$rolling.avg.temp<-rolling.avg


#calculate rolling average # of PABU's in the previous 10 year window
SD.vagrancy$PABU<-as.numeric(SD.vagrancy$PABU)
rolling.avg<-c(rep(NA, times=9))
for (i in 10:77){
  rolling.avg[i]<-mean(SD.vagrancy$PABU[c((i-9):i)])
}
#add to DF
SD.vagrancy$rolling.avg.PABU<-rolling.avg

##ggplot
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(SD.vagrancy, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*100, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("PABU abundance" = "blue", "temp" = "red")) +
  labs(y = "Values") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(SD.vagrancy, aes(x = date)) +
  #geom_point(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*2+6.5, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  #geom_point(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*2+6.5, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  ylim(6.5, 8.5) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("PABU abundance" = "gray", "temp" = "black")) +
  labs(y = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))


pp <- ggplot(SD.vagrancy, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*2+6.5, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  ylim(6.5, 8.5) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("PABU abundance" = "gray", "temp" = "black")) +
  labs(y = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))

#ggsave("~/Desktop/painted.bunting.note/SD.obs.pdf", pp, width = 8, height = 4, units = "in")
```


### Grab vagrancy data for Nebraska and plot against sightings
```{r}
NE.vagrancy<-read.csv("~/Desktop/painted.bunting.note/NOAA.neb.annual.temp.csv")
NE.vagrancy$date<-row.names(NE.vagrancy)
NE.vagrancy$date<-substr(NE.vagrancy$date,1,4)
NE.vagrancy<-NE.vagrancy[3:78,c(2,1)]
rownames(NE.vagrancy)<-NULL
colnames(NE.vagrancy)<-c("date","temp")
NE.vagrancy[77,]<-c("2026",NA)
NE.vagrancy$PABU<-c(rep(0, times=10),1,rep(0, times=5),1,1,rep(0, times=5),1,rep(0, times=22),2,rep(0, times=5),2,1,rep(0, times=2),2,0,2,rep(0, times=5),1,rep(0, times=4),2,0,1,1,1,0,0,2)
#convert farenheit to celsius
NE.vagrancy$temp<-as.numeric(NE.vagrancy$temp)
NE.vagrancy$temp <- (NE.vagrancy$temp - 32) * (5 / 9)

#calculate rolling average temp in the previous 10 year window
rolling.avg<-c(rep(NA, times=9))
for (i in 10:77){
  rolling.avg[i]<-mean(NE.vagrancy$temp[c((i-9):i)])
}
#add to DF
NE.vagrancy$rolling.avg.temp<-rolling.avg


#calculate rolling average # of PABU's in the previous 10 year window
NE.vagrancy$PABU<-as.numeric(NE.vagrancy$PABU)
rolling.avg<-c(rep(NA, times=9))
for (i in 10:77){
  rolling.avg[i]<-mean(NE.vagrancy$PABU[c((i-9):i)])
}
#add to DF
NE.vagrancy$rolling.avg.PABU<-rolling.avg

##ggplot
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(NE.vagrancy, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*100, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("PABU abundance" = "blue", "temp" = "red")) +
  labs(y = "Values") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(NE.vagrancy, aes(x = date)) +
  #geom_point(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*2+8.5, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  #geom_point(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*2+8.5, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  ylim(8.5, 10.5) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("PABU abundance" = "gray", "temp" = "black")) +
  labs(y = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))


pp <- ggplot(NE.vagrancy, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.PABU*2+8.5, color = "PABU abundance", group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling.avg.temp, color = "temp", group = 1)) +
  ylim(8.5, 10.5) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("PABU abundance" = "gray", "temp" = "black")) +
  labs(y = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))

#ggsave("~/Desktop/painted.bunting.note/NE.obs.pdf", pp, width = 8, height = 4, units = "in")
```
